name: Theodulus, Agathopodes and Companions
kontakia: (Tone 8) Brothers to each other by the spirit* and united together in a bond of faith,* you passed through life in prayer and fasting* and attracted many people to knowledge of the holy.* By your bravery you imprisoned guile,* and, suffering under the law, you received crowns.* O truly great saints,* beg God to forgive the sins of those who honor your sacred memory.
